question_text: Describe your incident response plan and last test date.

We engage an external IR retainer with a 4-hour SLA. Playbooks exist for ransomware, BEC, and insider threat scenarios.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed June 2020 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed June 2022 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your incident response plan and last test date.
response_text: We maintain a formal incident response plan aligned with NIST SP 800-61. The plan was last tested via tabletop exercise on November 2022 with executive participation. We engage an external IR retainer with a 4-hour SLA. Playbooks exist for ransomware, BEC, and insider threat scenarios.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed January 2023 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.
response_text: This is a mature control area with documented procedures, regular testing, and continuous improvement based on metrics and threat intelligence.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed February 2023 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your incident response plan and last test date.
response_text: We maintain a formal incident response plan aligned with NIST SP 800-61. The plan was last tested via tabletop exercise on February 2021 with executive participation. We engage an external IR retainer with a 4-hour SLA. Playbooks exist for ransomware, BEC, and insider threat scenarios.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.
response_text: This is a mature control area with documented procedures, regular testing, and continuous improvement based on metrics and threat intelligence.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed November 2021 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed August 2020 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your incident response plan and last test date.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed April 2019 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed June 2021 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe your incident response plan and last test date.
response_text: We maintain a formal incident response plan aligned with NIST SP 800-61. The plan was last tested via tabletop exercise on March 2020 with executive participation. We engage an external IR retainer with a 4-hour SLA. Playbooks exist for ransomware, BEC, and insider threat scenarios.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.
response_text: This is a mature control area with documented procedures, regular testing, and continuous improvement based on metrics and threat intelligence.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed July 2020 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

We engage an external IR retainer with a 4-hour SLA. Playbooks exist for ransomware, BEC, and insider threat scenarios.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.
response_text: This is a mature control area with documented procedures, regular testing, and continuous improvement based on metrics and threat intelligence.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed July 2022 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed June 2021 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed May 2023 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.
response_text: This is a mature control area with documented procedures, regular testing, and continuous improvement based on metrics and threat intelligence.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed September 2022 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.

question_text: Describe your incident response plan and last test date.
response_text: We maintain a formal incident response plan aligned with NIST SP 800-61. The plan was last tested via tabletop exercise on May 2020 with executive participation. We engage an external IR retainer with a 4-hour SLA. Playbooks exist for ransomware, BEC, and insider threat scenarios.

question_text: Describe your third-party vendor risk management program.
response_text: This is a mature control area with documented procedures, regular testing, and continuous improvement based on metrics and threat intelligence.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed March 2020 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed September 2020 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.

question_text: Describe your data backup strategy and recovery testing cadence.
response_text: All production systems are backed up daily with immutable storage in a separate cloud account. Backups are encrypted with customer-managed keys. We test full restoration of tier-1 systems quarterly; last test completed August 2020 with RTO of 8 hours achieved.

question_text: Describe MFA coverage across users, systems, and privileged accounts.
response_text: MFA is enforced for 100% of users via FIDO2 keys or authenticator apps. Privileged access requires hardware tokens. SaaS applications are integrated via SSO with conditional access policies. Service accounts use certificate-based authentication.
